data.title: Trump orders U.S. drugmakers to decrease prices by September, lacking legal authority to enforce.
data.description: The government has failed to provide a clear legal basis to force pharmaceutical companies to lower their prices.
Rep. Tommy Tuberville reveals recent stock trading: MSFT, TSM, INTC, F, PYPL, along with 17 others.

data.title: Coherus Oncology will report Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025 through a conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on July 31, 2025, Coherus Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHRS) disclosed the upcoming release of its second quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, August 7, 2025. A conference call and webcast will be led by Coherus’ management team at 5:00 p.m. EDT on August 7, 2025, to delve into the financial outcomes and deliver a comprehensive business overview.
Mercer International Inc. announces Q2 2025 earnings.

data.title: Reddit's Q2 earnings: Revenue beats at $499.6M, EPS beats at 48 cents per share. 78% revenue growth with DAUq up by 21%.
data.description: Reddit Inc, listed as RDDT on NYSE, released their Q2 financial results after trading hours, showing positive numbers. The second-quarter revenue stood at $499.6 million, surpassing the anticipated $424.73 million. Earnings for the quarter were 48 cents per share, exceeding the projected 19 cents per share. This represented a 78% increase in total revenue from the previous year, attributed to a 21% year-over-year surge in daily active unique users (DAUq). RDDT stock experienced an upward trend following the announcement. For more details, the full report can be found on Benzinga.com.
Lawmaker Tuberville reveals recent stock trades, including KEY, PARA, VZ, RF, UAA, and 10 others.

data.title: Huntsman Corp (NYSE: HUN) declared $0.25 per share cash dividend on common stock, payable on Sep 30, 2025, to stockholders of record as of Sep 15.
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, on July 31, 2025, Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN) revealed a $0.25 per share cash dividend on its common stock. This dividend will be issued on September 30, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as of September 15.

Arhaus will reveal Q2 2025 results on Aug. 7, 2025.

data.title: Apple exceeded June-quarter targets with strong iPhone and services sales, causing stock to rise. Wall Street impressed.
data.description: Apple exceeded expectations for its fiscal third quarter, surpassing Wall Street's projections due to robust sales in both iPhone and services sectors. As a result, Apple's stock price experienced an increase.

data.title: Cloudflare beats Q2 earnings, Q3 sales guidance above expectations, stock climbs.
data.description: Cloudflare's stock saw a rise following the announcement of their Q2 earnings, which exceeded expectations, as well as their Q3 sales guidance, which surpassed estimates. The company reported significant growth in big deals, leading to a positive outlook for the upcoming quarter.

data.title: Amazon stock falls despite beating earnings expectation in Q2 report. Mixed outlook leads to late Thursday drop.
data.description: Shares of Amazon experienced a decline on Thursday evening, despite the company revealing second-quarter results that surpassed the expectations of Wall Street analysts. The tech giant's stock fell despite an earnings beat, with a mixed outlook moving forward.

data.title: Palantir stock up 111% in 2025, Citi expects Q2 revenue beat. Shares hit new high before pullback.
data.description: After experiencing a 111% increase in 2025, Palantir stock is highly anticipated ahead of the Q2 earnings report. A Citi analyst predicts a sales beat for the company. Following this, the shares reached a new high before retracting.

data.title: Reddit's stock surges after reporting 78% revenue growth, with user growth surpassing expectations ahead of second-quarter earnings.
data.description: Reddit's stock is surging today ahead of its second-quarter earnings report. The company has seen impressive user growth, surpassing expectations. The stock price is reflecting this positive news, with a 78% increase in revenue being reported. This upward trend comes in anticipation of the earnings results being released later in the day.

data.title: Coinbase beats earnings views, stock falls after Q2 results. Misses key estimates.
data.description: Coinbase stock experienced a decline towards the end of Thursday following the release of its second-quarter earnings report. Despite surpassing earnings expectations, the crypto exchange fell short on crucial metrics, which led to a drop in its stock value.

data.title: First Solar stock gains strength with rising price, receives upgrade to IBD Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: First Solar has demonstrated a significant increase in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This development indicates strong growth potential for the company in the market. The stock of First Solar has now earned a higher Relative Strength Rating due to its improved performance. This upgrade reflects the company's positive trajectory and increased investor interest. This change underscores the company's growing strength and competitive position within the industry. Investors are likely taking notice of this positive trend in First Solar's stock, which suggests a promising outlook for the company's future performance.
Trump: We haven't spoken with Canada today

data.title: Ambiq Micro closes IPO of 4.6M shares at $24/share, with an additional 600k shares, raising $110.4M. Trading as "AMBQ" on NYSE.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Ambiq Micro, Inc. completed its upsized initial public offering of 4,600,000 shares of common stock, which included 600,000 additional shares exercised by underwriters, at a price of $24.00 per share. The total gross proceeds amounted to $110.4 million before deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The company's shares commenced trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "AMBQ" on July 30, 2025.

data.title: Stampede Drilling Inc. announces Q2 2025 results: Revenue $6,009 (39% decrease), Net Loss $2,996 (33% decrease), EBITDA ($609) (165% decrease). The Corporation repurchased 3,125 common shares. Outlook remains challenging due to commodity pricing volatility. Increased tidewater access expected to help. Expanded Credit Agreement till 2028. Operating days and rigs utilization decreased. Stampede operates in Western Canada. Financial details for the quarter and six months ending June 30, 2025 provided.
data.description: Stampede Drilling Inc. reported its financial and operational results for the second quarter of 2025, with revenue at $6,009 (a 39% decrease from 2024), a gross margin of 16% (down from 30% in 2024), and a net loss of $2,996. Adjusted EBITDA was ($609), free cash flow at ($2,301), and the company repurchased and canceled 3,125 common shares. Despite volatile commodity pricing and geopolitical challenges affecting energy supply, Stampede had 14 out of 17 rigs operational in early 2025. The company extended the term of its Credit Agreement to September 2028. Financially, revenue for the quarter was down 39% from 2024, while net loss increased by 33%. Adjusted EBITDA was down 165%, and free cash flow decreased by 174%. Stampede operates in Western Canada with headquarters in Calgary. On July 21, 2025, the company extended its credit agreement with major banks, aiming for continued growth and returns to shareholders.
